name: Pita Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Split pitas horizontally into 2 rounds. Spread rough edges with margarine. Place on cookie sheet.
3. In a small bowl, toss together oregano and Parmesan cheese. Sprinkle over the margarine.
4. Cut each bread into wedges. Broil about 5 inches from heating element until crisp, about 2 minutes. Watch carefully!
